title: Components & Props Quiz
description: Test your understanding of React components and prop patterns.

questions.question: Can a React component modify its own props?

options.text: Yes, by directly reassigning the prop
No — props are read-only and flow one-way from parent to child
Yes, but only for object and array props

questions.question: What is the 'children' prop in React?

options.text: A lifecycle method for child components
Any JSX content nested between a component's opening and closing tags
An array of all child component names
A prop that only accepts text strings

questions.question: What pattern solves prop drilling in React?

options.text: Passing props through every intermediate component
Context API or state management libraries like Redux
